description: The locally frozen GEO series-matrix download was truncated at 12 MB and failed gzip end-of-stream validation during the third scheduled unblinding step.
reason: Incomplete transfer of the prespecified public source file; no score, trajectory, AUROC or time effect was generated.
impact_assessment: Technical input-integrity repair only. The file was re-downloaded from the same frozen GEO URL; the corrupt copy was retained and both hashes were recorded.
resolution: Replaced with the complete 103 MB file from the identical GEO endpoint; gzip validation and 447-sample count passed.

description: The deposited matrix's global-median baseline transformation produced negative centered values incompatible with the frozen positive-scale ratio and geometric-mean formulas.
reason: The scale conflict became observable only after the complete matrix was restored. The unblinding run stopped before any score or performance result was written.
impact_assessment: Result-blind preprocessing rescue. Signature formulas, genes, directions, time windows and patient inclusion were unchanged. The rescue affects expression scale for GSE236713 and is retained as a sensitivity/limitation.
resolution: Downloaded all 447 public Agilent Feature Extraction files; used gProcessedSignal, non-control per-array 75th-percentile scaling to the cohort median and log2 transformation; retained only the 101 pre-locked probes. All arrays, genes, 8 signatures and 40 manual checks passed.
approved_by: Protocol-defined recoverable-preprocessing rule; transparent post-unlock deviation
